query_title: AlphaSharpe: LLM-Driven Discovery of Robust Risk-Adjusted Metrics
llm_enhanced_query: This paper focuses on using large language models to evolve and optimize financial metrics for better robustness and predictive power. It introduces a framework that iteratively refines risk-return measures, offering insights into how LLMs can enhance financial analytics and decision-making. AlphaSharpe LLM financial metrics risk-adjusted return portfolio performance
